---
title: "STA490_311Complaints_overall_count_and_bike"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-30"
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(stringr)
library(googlesheets4)
```
# upload and read file
```{r}
url_2022 <- "https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1kEyNKpAKALl2nxEmkO5Vyzl6HUDY2IsJ"
url_2023 <- "https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1MGwfHsucz-wqOD3iIrrXq9e2XC58PD8y"
url_2024 <- "https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1CaOFmCz7RdB-s586nCf-cWtzXa_Ug_jg"
url_2025 <- "https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1X5QU0D4Rc7_0jKekDos1_1JcBdNvdV2c"

df_2022 <- read.csv(url_2022)
df_2023 <- read.csv(url_2023)
df_2024 <- read.csv(url_2024)
df_2025 <- read.csv(url_2025)
```

# filter area BEACH and HIGHPARK
```{r}
# combine all files
df <- bind_rows(df_2022, df_2023, df_2024, df_2025)

# filter area (beach & highpark)
df_beach <- df %>%
  filter(First.3.Chars.of.Postal.Code == "M4E" |
         First.3.Chars.of.Postal.Code == "M4L" |
         First.3.Chars.of.Postal.Code == "M4M")

df_highpark <- df %>%
  filter(Ward == "Parkdale-High Park (04)")
```

# put all sections into 5 major categories: Waste & Environmental, Animal & Parks, Traffic & Road, Municipal Operations, Enforcement & Investigation
```{r}
categorize_data <- function(data) {
  data %>%
    mutate(
      Major_Category = case_when(
        Section %in% c("Collections", "Waste Enforcement", "Litter Operations",
                       "Collections and Litter Operations") 
        ~ "Waste & Environmental",

        Section %in% c("Toronto Animal Services", "Parks Enforcement",
                       "Forestry & Recreation", "Climate & Forestry", "Parks") 
        ~ "Animal & Parks",

        Section %in% c("Road Operations", "Right of Way (ROW)", "Traffic Ops",
                       "Traffic Safety", "Traffic Management", "TMC", "Transfer") 
        ~ "Traffic & Road",

        Section %in% c("District Ops", "Operations", 
                       "Business Operations Management") 
        ~ "Municipal Operations",

        Section %in% c("Investigation Services", "Bylaw Enforcement",
                       "Business Licensing Enforcement", "Permits & Enforcement") 
        ~ "Enforcement & Investigation",

        TRUE ~ "Other"
      )
    )
}
```

```{r}
# categorize both areas
df_beach <- categorize_data(df_beach)
df_highpark <- categorize_data(df_highpark)
```

```{r}
get_cate_counts <- function(data) {
  data %>%
    count(Major_Category) %>%
    mutate(
      prop = n / sum(n),
      label = percent(prop, accuracy = 0.1)
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(prop)) %>%
    mutate(Major_Category = factor(Major_Category, levels = Major_Category))
}
```

```{r}
cate_counts_beach <- get_cate_counts(df_beach)
cate_counts_highpark <- get_cate_counts(df_highpark)
```

```{r}
my_colors <- c(
  "#2C5D86",
  "#4682B4",
  "#6BAED6",
  "#9ECAE1",
  "#C6DBEF",
  "#E3EEF7"
)
```

# barplot for beach area
```{r}
ggplot(cate_counts_beach, aes(x = "", y = prop, fill = Major_Category)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "white") +
  coord_polar(theta = "y", start = pi/2, direction = -1) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = label),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Beach Complaint Distribution by Major Category",
    x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "Category"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
```

# barplot for highpark area
```{r}
ggplot(cate_counts_highpark, aes(x = "", y = prop, fill = Major_Category)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "white") +
  coord_polar(theta = "y", start = pi/2, direction = -1) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = label),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "High Park Complaint Distribution by Major Category",
    x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "Category"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
```

# show beach area highest subsection
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

cate_merge_beach <- df_beach %>%
  filter(Section == "Collections") %>% 
  mutate(
    complaint_subgroup = case_when(
      str_detect(Service.Request.Type, regex("Not Picked Up", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Not Picked Up",
      TRUE ~ Service.Request.Type
    )
  ) %>%
  count(complaint_subgroup, name = "total_count") %>%
  arrange(desc(total_count))

cate_merge_beach
```

```{r}
# Step 1: filter Beach + Collections
collections_beach <- df_beach %>%
  filter(Section == "Collections")

# Step 2: clean complaint subgroup
cate_merge_beach <- collections_beach %>%
  mutate(
    complaint_subgroup = case_when(
      # first, merge all complaint types containing "Not Picked Up"
      str_detect(Service.Request.Type, regex("Not Picked Up", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Not Picked Up",
      
      # otherwise, extract the last part after ":" or "/"
      TRUE ~ str_trim(
        sapply(str_split(Service.Request.Type, "[:/]"), tail, 1)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  count(complaint_subgroup, name = "total_count") %>%
  arrange(desc(total_count))

# View result
cate_merge_beach


cate_merge_beach_top10 <- cate_merge_beach %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

cate_merge_beach_top10


ggplot(cate_merge_beach_top10,
       aes(x = reorder(complaint_subgroup, total_count),
           y = total_count,
           fill = complaint_subgroup == "Not Picked Up")) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#2C5D86", "FALSE" = "#C6DBEF"), guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title = "Top Complaint Subgroups within Collections in the Beach Area",
    x = "Complaint Subgroup",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# total complaints count
count(df_beach)
count(df_highpark)
```

```{r}
# collections section count
collections_count <- df_beach %>%
  filter(Section == "Collections") %>%
  summarise(Total = n())

collections_count
```

# bike-related data
```{r}
df_beach_bike <- df_beach %>%
  filter(str_detect(Service.Request.Type,
                    regex("bike|bicy", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  mutate(
    Creation.Date = parse_date_time(
      Creation.Date,
      orders = c("Ymd HMS", "Y-m-d HMS", "Y-m-d HM", "Y-m-d",
                 "mdY HMS", "mdY HM", "mdY")
    ),
    year_month = floor_date(Creation.Date, "month")
  ) %>%
  count(year_month, name = "n")

df_beach_bike_raw <- df_beach %>%
  filter(str_detect(Service.Request.Type, regex("bike|bicy", ignore_case = TRUE)))
df_beach_bike_raw <- df_beach_bike_raw %>%
  mutate(
    Bike_Category = case_when(
      Service.Request.Type %in% c(
        "Complaint/Investigation - Abandoned Bikes",
        "Complaint - Abandoned Bikes in Rideable Condition",
        "Litter / Bike Removal Inquiry",
        "Bike Removal and Lost Bike Inquiry"
      ) ~ "Abandoned / Removal",

      str_detect(Service.Request.Type, regex("ring and post|bike ring|post", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Bike Ring / Post",

      str_detect(Service.Request.Type, regex("lane|trail|cycling", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Bike Lane / Cycling Infrastructure",

      TRUE ~ "Other Bike Issues"
    )
  )
bike_category_count <- df_beach_bike_raw %>%
  count(Bike_Category, name = "Total") %>%
  arrange(desc(Total))

bike_category_count
```

# bike complaints trend
```{r}
# draw plot of trend from 2022-2025
ggplot(df_beach_bike, aes(x = year_month, y = n)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly total bike-related 311 service requests",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of bike-related requests"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

# bike complaints count
```{r}
# Horizontal bar plot for bike categories

ggplot(bike_category_count,
       aes(x = reorder(Bike_Category, Total), y = Total)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#4682B4") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Bike-Related 311 Complaints in the Beach Area",
    x = "",
    y = "Number of Complaints"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```
